review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "You are a read-only code reviewer with no tools. Never emit a tool call. Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema." --json-schema "$(tr -d '\n' < /tmp/cp00-070-review-schema.json)" --output-format json < /tmp/cp00-070-review-prompt-valid.txt > /tmp/cp00-070-claude-review-output-valid.json

findings.title: export_download egress marker remains false
findings.details: Claude noted that the export_download action row has external_sharing_surface=false even though export/download is an egress vector. The pack still requires legal hold, ethical wall, object ACL, matched rule capture, deny-over-allow, audit hint, and human approval metadata, and it performs no runtime permission or sharing action.
findings.recommendation: Consider a future naming or metadata refinement if downstream runtime packs distinguish external sharing from export/download egress. Not required for CP00-070 closeout.

findings.title: command_evidence_ref convention points to upstream evidence in reviewed diff
findings.details: Claude noted that command_evidence_ref in the reviewed implementation points to the upstream CP00-069 evidence convention while CP00-070 evidence is created after review. This is a provenance convention question, not a behavior weakening issue, because required_evidence_refs and pack artifacts are validated at closeout.
findings.recommendation: Keep the convention adjudicated for this pack; future packs may make current-pack command evidence refs explicit after evidence creation.

findings.title: requested_pack_id collides with upstream pack id by live cursor correction
findings.details: Claude noted requested_pack_id=CP00-069 while pack_id/planned_pack_id=CP00-070. This matches the locked queue live-cursor correction pattern and is explicitly recorded in correction_reason.
findings.recommendation: No action for this pack; retain correction_reason as the audit trail.

residual_risks: Low. CP00-070 binds metadata-only primary action boundary rows and control fields, rejects runtime/write/LDIP claims, and leaves enforcement implementation deferred to later planned runtime packs.
Remaining risk is informational: export/download egress naming, command evidence provenance convention, and live-cursor requested_pack_id correction semantics.
parsed_review.overall_summary: CP00-070 ControlPlanePermissionAuditPrimaryActionBoundary is internally consistent, metadata-only, fail-closed, and no-write. Claude reported no P0/P1/P2 findings and three non-blocking P3 observations.

raw_result.result_excerpt: APPROVE. No P0/P1/P2 blockers found. Severity counts: P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=3 informational. Residual risk low.
